property_history.title: Purchase
property_history.description: Pre-CGT property purchased in 1979 for $45,000 - 5-acre farmland with farmhouse
property_history.notes: Pre-CGT property purchased in 1979 for $45,000 - 5-acre farmland with farmhouse

property_history.title: Subdivided

subdivisionDetails.notes: Pre-CGT property subdivided into 3 lots. Lot A (farmhouse) retained. Lots B & C (vacant) sold. Subdivision creates CGT event for subdivided lots despite pre-CGT acquisition.

property_history.description: Subdivision registered - Pre-CGT 5-acre block divided into 3 lots. Lot A (2 acres with farmhouse) retained. Lots B & C (1.5 acres each, vacant) for sale.

properties.notes: Pre-CGT property (purchased 1979) subdivided into 3 lots in 2023. Lot A (2 acres with farmhouse, retained). Lots B & C (1.5 acres vacant each, sold). Market value at subdivision: $3,800,000 total. Subdivision costs: $85,000. Important: Subdivision of pre-CGT property creates CGT event for subdivided lots.

properties.address: Lot A, 8 Old Farm Road, Dural NSW 2158
properties.notes: Lot A - 2-acre lot with farmhouse retained as main residence. Owner continues living here. Market value at subdivision: $1,800,000 (47.4%). Pre-CGT exemption continues for this lot. Still held.

properties.address: Lot B, Old Farm Road, Dural NSW 2158

property_history.title: Sale

costBases.name: Real Estate Agent Commission
costBases.description: Commission paid to real estate agent for sale

costBases.name: Legal Fees (Disposal)
costBases.description: Legal fees for property sale and conveyancing

property_history.description: Lot B (vacant land) sold for $980,000. Pre-CGT exemption does not apply - subdivision creates CGT event. Market value at subdivision becomes cost base.
property_history.notes: First vacant lot sold - 2 months after subdivision

properties.notes: Lot B - 1.5-acre vacant land. Market value at subdivision: $950,000 (25% of total). Sold 2023-08-01. CGT applies despite pre-CGT original acquisition - subdivision creates CGT event.

properties.address: Lot C, Old Farm Road, Dural NSW 2158

property_history.description: Lot C (vacant land) sold for $1,350,000. Pre-CGT exemption does not apply - subdivision creates CGT event. Market value at subdivision becomes cost base.
property_history.notes: Second vacant lot sold - 2 years after subdivision

properties.notes: Lot C - 1.5-acre vacant land. Market value at subdivision: $1,050,000 (27.6% of total). Sold 2025-09-15. CGT applies despite pre-CGT original acquisition - subdivision creates CGT event.

user_query: I bought this property in 1979 . I've subdivided it and sold two of the new blocks. Is it all exempt because the original property was pre-CGT?

scenario_info.name: Subdivision - Pre-CGT Property
